microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing API-driven workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 development of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining SDK-style self-service scheduling requirements that cut operational toil by 30% and transitioned complex drill execution to a scalable, customer-configurable model.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate — surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation framework adopted across enterprise accounts.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, translating complex technical designs into clear stakeholder strategies.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, integrating RESTful APIs and restructuring execution pipelines to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase forward-deployed drill capacity by 21% without adding headcount.

Developed custom data integration workflows and reporting dashboards to synchronize resilience metrics with external enterprise systems, ensuring platform outputs were meticulously aligned with each customer's technical environment and business priorities.

Designed and led targeted hands-on workshops for enterprise customer engineering teams on API usage and custom tooling best practices, enabling customers to **independently maintain and evolve** the solutions deployed on their behalf.
microsoft_2023: Championed **API and SDK adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting hands-on demos and training sessions that drove utilization across 14 key enterprise teams and saved **37 engineering hours monthly** through custom workflow automation.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical SDK feature gaps and translating complex customer needs into actionable technical designs for the engineering org.

Improved **data retrieval and integration** by implementing rigorous metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search platform, cutting lookup time by 83% and enabling downstream automation pipelines to consume structured data reliably.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, coordinating custom tooling decisions across 140+ engineering and operations teams.

Built a scalable product strategy to eliminate manual toil during region launches — conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to surface **81 hours of manual effort per region** and delivering a roadmap to automate critical deployment paths via API integrations.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** to track and visualize operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact custom tooling investments aligned to enterprise customer SLA commitments.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping software dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and building custom integration workflows to synchronize fleet state with enterprise systems.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process for forward-deployed engineering teams supporting robotics operations.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and reducing manual configuration effort required during on-site customer deployments.
pro_painters: Increased **job bookings by 26%** by optimizing operations and managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, deploying a new CRM workflow that automated data entry and integrated client records with reporting dashboards.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile to drive qualified inbound leads into the automated CRM pipeline.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks through data-driven tooling that surfaced cost patterns invisible to manual reporting processes.
